hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */packages/*/src/*.ts|*/packages/*/src/*.tsx) case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.test.*|*.spec.*) ;; *) echo '[attention-driven:design] verify change respects design/ boundaries — re-check design/DESIGN.md if scope shifts' ;; esac ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */CLAUDE.md|*/AGENTS.md) echo '[L1 litmus] Every line in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md is always-loaded context. Would removing this line cause the agent to make a worse architectural decision? If not, move it to L2 (design/, skill body) or L3 (code/docs).' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */design/*) echo '[design-code separation] design/ changes must be committed separately from code changes — do not stage design/ and packages/ in the same commit.' ;; esac

echo '[consistency] Did you rename a path, term, symbol, or restructure anything this turn? If so, grep for every file that references the old form and update them — stale references are a top failure mode.'
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */bun.lock|*/package-lock.json) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files directly. Run bun install instead.' && exit 1;; esac
